query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_proyectos,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN p.quotationId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as proyectos_con_cotizacion,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN p.quotationId IS NULL THEN 1 END) as proyectos_sin_cotizacion,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN p.deletedAt IS NULL THEN 1 END) as proyectos_activos,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN p.deletedAt IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as proyectos_eliminados
FROM projects p
WHERE p.dataOrigin = 'manual' AND p.deletedAt IS NULL
command:

  COUNT(*) as total_proyectos,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN p.quotationId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as proyectos_con_cotizacion,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN p.quotationId IS NULL THEN 1 END) as proyectos_sin_cotizacion,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN p.deletedAt IS NULL THEN 1 END) as proyectos_activos,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN p.deletedAt IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as proyectos_eliminados
FROM projects p
WHERE p.dataOrigin = 'manual' AND p.deletedAt IS NULL
